prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为约 21693→21449→24024→27386→26800 名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2024 年达到峰值 27386 后 2025 年小幅回升至 26800 名，近两年波动幅度约 586 名；2025 年基准位次约 26800 名；该校在重庆物理类招生计划 2021–2023 年均为 29 人，2024 年增至 30 人，2025 年扩至 35 人；2026 年计划 36 人，较 2025 年再增 1 人，连续两年扩招，竞争压力有所加大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北林业大学为教育部直属 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第 115 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 113–115 区间，属中游偏上 211；抖音综合热度排名第 59，评价为「较热」，短视频曝光量处于 211 高校中等水平；学校声誉文件中无该校明显负面或正面舆情记录，未见投档断档异常信号，整体声誉平稳；该校传统优 势为林学、林业工程等农林类学科，与重庆考生主流报考偏好匹配度一般。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热，但该校 在重庆物理类招生专业中热门工科名额有限；重庆 2026 年普通高考总人数约 20.9 万，较 2025 年物理类+历史类合计 21.3 万略有减少，按历史比例估算物理类考生约 13.69 万，较 2025 年 13.95 万减少约 1.85%，竞争略有缓解；该校位于黑龙江哈尔滨，距重庆较远，属跨省招生；该校全国招生总量中重庆占比约 0.6%，属较小生源地，地域偏好对报考热度影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026 年招生计划继续小幅扩招（36 人 vs 35 人）以及本省考生总数略有减少等因素；考虑考生规模微降带来的竞争缓解，预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 27279 名，波动区间 26779–27779 名。

- 电气类（含电气工程及其自动化、自动化）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约 27279 名，区间 26779–27779 名。建议位次在区间内以二档专业为主力填报，一档专业（计算机、电气、电子信息）可冲刺但录取概率较低，三档专业（土木、工商管理、林学类）作为保底。位次明显优于区 间上限（<26779）可重点冲刺一档热门工科专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 21693→21449→24024→27386→26800, showing a fluctuating and backward trend overall. In 2024, it peaked at 27386, then slightly recovered to 26800 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 586 in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 26800. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing was 29 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 30 in 2024, and expanded to 35 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 36, an increase of 1 compared to 2025, with two consecutive years of expansion, leading to increased competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Forestry University is a directly affiliated 211 Project and Double First-Class university under the Ministry of Education. Its ranking on the Soft Science Chinese University Main List is approximately 115th (2026), stable in the 113–115 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. Its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 59th, rated as 'relatively popular', with short video exposure at a medium level among 211 universities. The university's reputation file shows no significant negative or positive public opinion records, no abnormal signals of enrollment gaps, and overall stable reputation. Its traditional strengths are in forestry, forestry engineering, and other agriculture and forestry disciplines, which have average alignment with the mainstream preferences of Chongqing candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular in society, but the university has limited slots for popular engineering majors in its Physics Category enrollment in Chongqing. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Chongqing Gaokao is about 209,000, a slight decrease from the 2025 total of 213,000 for Physics and History categories combined. Estimated by historical proportion, Physics Category candidates are about 136,900, a decrease of about 1.85% from 139,500 in 2025, slightly easing competition. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang, far from Chongqing, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Chongqing accounts for about 0.6% of the university's national enrollment, a relatively small source region, so regional preference has limited impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the continued slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (36 vs 35), and the slight decrease in the number of local candidates, along with the easing of competition due to the slight drop in candidate numbers, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 27279, with a fluctuation range of 26779–27779.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)

- Electrical Class (including Electrical Engineering and Automation, Automation)
- Electronic Information Class (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Vehicle Engineering

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering
- Business Administration Class (including Business Administration, Marketing, Accounting, Agricultural and Forestry Economics Management)
- Landscape Architecture
- Forestry Class (including Forestry, Forest Protection).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 27279, with a range of 26779–27779. It is recommended that candidates within the range focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice. Tier 1 majors (Computer, Electrical, Electronic Information) can be attempted but have a low admission probability, while Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Business Administration, Forestry Class) serve as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<26779) can focus on attempting Tier 1 popular engineering majors.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Forestry University is a directly affiliated 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university under the Ministry of Education; its Soft Science China University main ranking is about 115th (2026), with stable rankings in recent years; its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 59th, rated as 'relatively hot'; the university's reputation file shows no obvious negative or positive public opinion records, no abnormal signals of enrollment gaps, and overall reputation is stable; the university's traditional strengths are in agriculture and forestry disciplines, while the History Category enrollment majors are mainly Law, Business Administration, and Landscape Architecture, with average relevance to the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has a relatively hot social popularity (recommended), which may intensify competition for applications; Business Administration category is differentiated and wait-and-see; Landscape Architecture popularity is stable; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Chongqing in 2026 is about 209,000, with an estimated 72,100 History Category candidates based on historical proportions, a decrease of about 1.73% compared to 73,400 in 2025, slightly easing competition; the university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang, far from Chongqing, and is a cross-provincial enrollment; the number of History Category enrollments is very small (6–7 students), so regional preference has limited impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the gradual backward trend of historical rankings, the first expansion of History Category enrollment plan in 2026 (7 vs 6 students, an increase of 16.7%), and a slight decrease in the total number of local candidates; taking into account that the relatively hot popularity of Law major may attract more applicants, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 5558, with a fluctuation range of 5058–6058.
